name: morgana-fsi
description: MORGANA — Sistema de Inversión Growth Institucional. Plugins para análisis buy-side de US equities: equity research, financial modeling y private equity.

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: Equity research institucional: earnings analysis, initiating coverage, thesis tracking, sector overview, idea generation y catalyst calendar.

plugins.name: financial-analysis
plugins.description: Modelos financieros cuantitativos: DCF, comps, LBO, 3-statement model, competitive analysis y audit de Excel.

plugins.name: private-equity
plugins.description: Análisis PE adaptado a buy-side: unit economics, returns analysis (IRR/MOIC), IC memo, deal screening y portfolio monitoring.
